form.formComment: Improved sharply when second behind Ask Nicely at Bendigo last start over 425m (24.53). Good beginner who shouldn't be far away in the run.

form.formComment: Finished off last campaign with a fifth (26.60) in a MDN at this track three-and-a-half months ago. One of the major contenders.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Went up with lids.

form.formComment: Stepping out over 390m for the first time. Out of the placings in recent runs, most recently when fourth over 300m at Healesville. Not a prolific placegetter and is likely to struggle.

form.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (22.68) over 390m at this track. Squeeze draw to overcome. Has ability and should run well.

form.formComment: Yet to break through in seven runs, the latest effort a third over 425m at Bendigo in 24.61. Although yet to win tends to go well here. Should go very well.

form.formComment: Last start finished third in a Maiden on April 1 over 400m at Geelong behind Aston Sasha, beaten 4.5 lengths (22.98). Prepared to risk on this occasion.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in his races. Last start finished fourth over 390m at Ballarat, beaten 8 lengths. Safely held last time and looking to others.
